steps.assistant_text: 32-insn check-then-vtable-call helper. Promoted from 23.33% to 100% via two changes: (1) corrected logic — prior wrap misread `lw v1, 0x7C(v0)` as D[0x7C], it's actually p[0x7C] where p = a0[0x48] (inner-struct field, not global); (2) split D_00000000 into D_mgr_1594_a (gl_func arg base) and D_mgr_1594_c (D[0x30] store target), both aliased to 0x0 in undefined_syms_auto.txt — defeats IDO -O2 CSE on the placeholder per docs/IDO_CODEGEN.md feedback-ido-cse-bust-via-distinct-externs. Body: gl_func_0(D[0x190], a0); int *p = a0[0x48]; idx = p[0x7C]; if (p[idx*0x28 + 0x90] == 0) return; D[0x30] = a0; reload p; ((void(*)())p[idx*0x28 + 0x90])();.

metadata.verification: Verified byte-identical against expected/.o (0 diffs in 0x1594-0x1614 range).
